sections.heading: Academic summary
points: Jeremiah attended College of the Ozarks in Point Lookout, Missouri from September 2015 through June 2020.
The approved academic data lists a bachelor's degree with majors in Computer Science and Mathematics, plus a minor in Christian Apologetics.

sections.heading: College studies
points: The Computer Science major description emphasizes algorithms, data structures, system design, software and hardware interactions, and adapting to new technologies.
The Mathematics major description emphasizes theoretical and applied mathematics, tutoring, problem solving, and communicating complex ideas.

sections.heading: Leadership and commendations
points: The approved academic data lists Jeremiah as President of the Math and Physics Club from 2019 to 2020.
It also lists him as President of the Sigma Zeta honor society chapter in 2020 and Vice-President of the ACM club from 2018 to 2019.
The academic data includes a 189/200 Major Field Exam result for mathematics in 2020.
